seoTitle: Licola vs Lillico — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Licola and Lillico. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Licola and Lillico.
heading: Licola vs Lillico — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Licola, Victoria and Lillico, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Licola has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Lillico (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Licola or Lillico safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Licola has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Lillico scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Licola scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Lillico scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Licola or Lillico?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Licola has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.13% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
